query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750011, 'What were biblical prophets primarily?', 'multiple_choice', '["Fortune tellers","Covenant mediators who called Israel to faithfulness","Political leaders","Priests only"]', 'Covenant mediators who called Israel to faithfulness', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What is the difference between forth-telling and foretelling?', 'multiple_choice', '["No difference","Forth-telling is proclamation; foretelling is prediction","Both mean the same","Neither applies to prophecy"]', 'Forth-telling is proclamation; foretelling is prediction', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What characterizes apocalyptic literature?', 'multiple_choice', '["Plain language","Symbolic imagery, cosmic conflict, and eschatological themes","Historical narrative","Legal codes"]', 'Symbolic imagery, cosmic conflict, and eschatological themes', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What are the three main eschatological perspectives mentioned?', 'multiple_choice', '["Past, present, future","Premillennialism, amillennialism, postmillennialism","Liberal, conservative, moderate","None of the above"]', 'Premillennialism, amillennialism, postmillennialism', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'According to 2 Peter 1:19-21, what is the origin of prophecy?', 'multiple_choice', '["Human will","The Holy Spirit","Church tradition","Political agenda"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What should we avoid in interpreting prophecy?', 'multiple_choice', '["Careful study","Speculation and sensationalism","Historical context","Literary analysis"]', 'Speculation and sensationalism', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'According to Hebrews 1:1-2, through whom did God speak finally?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prophets only","His Son","Angels","Church fathers"]', 'His Son', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What is progressive fulfillment in prophecy?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prophecy is never fulfilled","Prophecy may have multiple stages of fulfillment","Prophecy is always literal","Prophecy is always symbolic"]', 'Prophecy may have multiple stages of fulfillment', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What is the central message of Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Detailed timeline of end times","Christ''s victory and the consummation of God''s kingdom","Political predictions","Historical record"]', 'Christ''s victory and the consummation of God''s kingdom', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'What do all eschatological perspectives affirm despite their differences?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing in common","Christ''s return, final judgment, and eternal state","Exact timeline","Political outcomes"]', 'Christ''s return, final judgment, and eternal state', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750011, 'Explain the difference between prophetic and apocalyptic literature and how to interpret each appropriately.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
